direct_action.name: Direct Action
direct_action.description: Short-duration strike against a high-value target. Fast ingress, decisive violence, fast egress. Enemy must be neutralized before they can react or reinforce.
phases: Actions on Objective (neutralize target, exploit intel)
direct_action.force_composition: Assault element (1-2 rifle squads), Support element (1 MG or sniper team on overwatch), Reserve (1 squad 500m back as QRF block)
ai_escalation: Phase 1: 1 sentry team at perimeter, 1 patrol on route
Phase 2 (player contact): commit reserve squad, change patrol to attack
Phase 3 (player inside objective): QRF vehicle arrives from alternate direction, reinforcement squad from 600m

game_master_scenario.setup: Spawn 1 command composition as HQ, 2 sentry teams around it, 1 patrol on road
ai_escalation: QRF squad from 600m after first contact
Vehicle QRF from town after 2 minutes of sustained contact
Reinforcement wave of 2 squads if players breach the HQ perimeter

special_reconnaissance.name: Special Reconnaissance
special_reconnaissance.description: Clandestine collection of intelligence without direct engagement. Enemy patrols avoid contact but will pursue if spotted. Atmosphere of tension and surveillance.
phases: Observation (static OP teams watching roads/key terrain)
special_reconnaissance.force_composition: Multiple 2-man sentry teams, 1-2 light vehicle patrols, no static weapons
ai_escalation: Phase 1: 3-4 sentry teams spread across area, behavior patrol
Phase 2 (player spotted): nearest 2 teams switch to hunt, broadcast CONTACT report
Phase 3 (player engaged): all patrols converge, vehicle patrol responds as QRF

personnel_recovery.name: Personnel Recovery
personnel_recovery.description: Enemy holds a position of value. Players must reach and secure it under fire.
phases: Assault (hard contact at the holding position)
personnel_recovery.force_composition: Outer cordon (2 patrol teams), Inner guard (1 rifle squad at objective), Pursuit force (1 squad staged 400m away)
ai_escalation: Phase 1: outer cordon patrolling, inner guard stationary defend
Phase 2 (player reaches inner perimeter): inner guard attacks, outer cordon converges
Phase 3 (player secures objective): pursuit force activates, vehicle QRF from 600m

deliberate_attack.name: Deliberate Attack
deliberate_attack.description: Methodical assault on a prepared enemy position. Suppress, fix, flank, finish. Players must work through defensive layers.
phases: Flank (assault element attacks from unexpected axis)
deliberate_attack.force_composition: Forward screen (1-2 sentry teams), Defensive line (2 rifle squads in bunkers), Fire support (1 static MG or mortar), Reserve (1 squad behind defensive line)
ai_escalation: Phase 1: forward screen patrols, defensive line on defend in composition
Phase 2 (player contact with forward screen): defensive line activates, fire support begins
Phase 3 (player breaches defensive line): reserve commits, vehicle QRF from flank

defense_in_depth.name: Defense in Depth
defense_in_depth.description: Enemy yields ground slowly, trading space for casualties. Multiple defensive lines. High intensity attrition warfare.
defense_in_depth.force_composition: Screen line (1 rifle squad, light vehicles), Main line (2 squads in bunkers, 1 static MG), Counterattack (1 squad + vehicle staged 600m behind)
ai_escalation: Phase 1: screen force engages, falls back after taking 50% casualties
Phase 2: main line engages from prepared positions, static MG provides overwatch
Phase 3 (main line broken): counterattack force advances

ambush.name: Ambush
ambush.description: Surprise attack from concealed positions along a player route. Maximum violence of action in minimum time.
phases: Emplacement (forces position silently before players arrive)
Initiation (triggered by player entering kill zone)
Withdrawal (break contact and reposition if players counterattack)
ambush.force_composition: Assault line (1-2 squads on one side of road/path), Cut-off team (1 team blocking retreat 200m ahead), Optional sniper on elevation
ai_escalation: Phase 1: ambush teams stationary on defend BEFORE player reaches kill zone
Phase 2 (player in kill zone): all teams switch to attack simultaneously
Phase 3 (player breaks through): pursuit team follows, block team repositions

convoy_operations.name: Convoy Attack
convoy_operations.description: Enemy convoy moving through the area. Players intercept and destroy. Vehicles are priority targets.
phases: Dismount (enemy dismounts and forms hasty defense)
convoy_operations.force_composition: Convoy (2-3 vehicles on patrol route), Dismount security (4-6 infantry per vehicle), QRF (1 squad at 400m)
ai_escalation: Phase 1: vehicles on patrol behavior along road route
Phase 2 (vehicle destroyed or contact): remaining vehicles stop, infantry dismount to attack
Phase 3 (convoy mostly destroyed): QRF activates from 600m

urban_operations.name: Urban Operations
urban_operations.description: Fighting through built-up area. Short sight lines. Every building a potential threat.
phases: Hold (enemy reinforces from other part of town)
urban_operations.force_composition: Street teams (1 squad per major road axis), Building guards (2-man sentry in key buildings), Reserve (1 squad for counterattack)
ai_escalation: Phase 1: sentry teams in buildings near town entrance, vehicles at road junctions
Phase 2 (player enters town): inner squads activate, street teams converge
Phase 3 (player deep in town): reserve squad flanks from opposite side

patrol_operations.name: Area Security Patrol
patrol_operations.description: Enemy controlling an area with mobile patrols. Low initial intensity, escalates if players spotted.
patrol_operations.force_composition: 2-3 patrol teams on different routes, 1 QRF team staged at central point
ai_escalation: Phase 1: patrol teams on patrol behavior, random routes
Phase 2 (player spotted or shot): nearest patrol switches to hunt, QRF activates
Phase 3 (sustained contact): all patrols converge, request reinforcement squad from 800m

checkpoint_operations.name: Checkpoint Control
checkpoint_operations.description: Enemy controls key road junction or crossing. Players must either bypass or assault through.
checkpoint_operations.force_composition: Checkpoint guards (1 team at post), Overwatch (1 sniper or MG on elevation), QRF (1 squad at 400m)
ai_escalation: Phase 1: guards on defend at checkpoint composition, overwatch stationary
Phase 2 (player approaches or fires): guards engage, overwatch activates
Phase 3 (checkpoint taken): QRF advances

combined_arms_principles.suppress_fix_flank_finish: Suppress enemy with fire, fix them in place with a unit, flank with a separate element, finish with assault
combined_arms_principles.overwatch_and_bound: One element fires while another moves. Never move without fire support.
combined_arms_principles.vehicle_infantry_cooperation: Vehicles provide fire support and mobility. Infantry clears terrain vehicles cannot enter. Never send a vehicle without infantry support.
combined_arms_principles.reserve_commitment: Never commit your reserve early. Hold it until the decisive moment.
combined_arms_principles.depth_not_width: Layer defenses in depth rather than a single wide line.

escalation_ladder.0_green: No contact. Patrol and area control only. 1-2 teams max.
escalation_ladder.1_yellow: Player activity detected. Patrols increase, sentries alert. 2-3 teams.
escalation_ladder.2_orange: Contact made. QRF commits, reinforcements stage. 4-6 teams.
escalation_ladder.3_red: Sustained firefight. All reserves committed. Vehicle QRF. 6-10 teams.
escalation_ladder.4_black: Critical position threatened. Maximum effort. All available forces. 10+ teams.

vehicle_tactics.apc_assault: 1. SPAWN APC at staging grid (500m+ from players). 2. SPAWN infantry squad at same grid with behavior defend (they board nearby vehicle). 3. On next heartbeat: MOVE APC to assault grid with behavior attack. 4. SPAWN dismount infantry at assault grid to reinforce.
vehicle_tactics.vehicle_patrol: SPAWN vehicle at one end of road. MOVE to far waypoint with behavior patrol. SPAWN infantry at midpoint as dismounted security.
vehicle_tactics.qrf_response: When players engage a position: SPAWN vehicle at a grid 600m+ away. MOVE toward contact with behavior attack. BROADCAST QRF en route to set player expectation.
vehicle_tactics.overwatch_gun: SPAWN static weapon (HMG, mortar) on elevated grid. SET_BEHAVIOR to defend. Creates persistent fire support that changes the tactical equation.
